title: profile_page queries for account ID redundantly
description: activitypub.rs profile_page calls fetch_account (which queries by username and returns the full row), then immediately queries 'SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE username = ?' again. The fix is to either add 'id' to AccountRow or combine the queries. Same pattern in the featured() handler which calls fetch_account then discards the result and re-queries for the ID.
close_reason: Deferred: one extra query per page load.
